waiver.name: waiver_1
waiver.description: Demote all errors in SVTB rule 11.2.1 (single character loop iterator) to warning severity

waiver.name: waiver_2
waiver.description: Disable UVM rule 2.8.1 failing on test_lib.sv for tests test_read_modify_write and test_2m_4s

waiver.name: waiver_3
waiver.description: Demote to INFO error hits for 'trans_collected' in rule UVM.6.2

pre-waiver.name: pre-waiver_1
pre-waiver.description:
..
Do not lint 3rd party IP in certain folder - applies to all checks

waiver.name: R.1164 @btl\.v-519
waiver.description: Check R.1164 in file btl\.v at line 519 is DISABLED

message-patterns.message-pattern: \QSize 1 of array 'btl.btl_selected_spi_data' has range 0 : 9, but index 'btl_gen_cntr_r' can have 16 values!\E\R\QHierarchy Paths: h15a_psoc_top.f.h15a_psoc_cls.f.h15a_psoc_macro.f.psoc_logic.boot_seq.btl_top.btl\E

waiver.name: R.1164 @btl\.v-520
waiver.description: Check R.1164 in file btl\.v at line 520 is DISABLED

message-patterns.message-pattern: \QSize 1 of array 'btl.btl_selected_spi_addr' has range 0 : 9, but index 'btl_gen_cntr_r' can have 16 values!\E\R\QHierarchy Paths: h15a_psoc_top.f.h15a_psoc_cls.f.h15a_psoc_macro.f.psoc_logic.boot_seq.btl_top.btl\E
